name: command-menu
description: Cmd+K command palette with fuzzy search over grouped commands

meta.name: CommandMenu
meta.description: Cmd+K command palette with fuzzy search over grouped commands

props.name: onOpenChange
props.description: Called with the next open state when it changes.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Placeholder text shown when the field is empty.

props.name: emptyLabel
props.description: Text shown when no commands match the query.

props.name: hotkey
props.description: Global Cmd/Ctrl+K toggles the menu via onOpenChange

props.name: loading
props.description: Shows a loading spinner in place of the empty state (for async items)

props.name: onQueryChange
props.description: Fires on every query keystroke — use to fetch async items

props.name: scopes
props.description: Selectable filter scopes. Renders a scope bar + chip; a scope activates by clicking its pill, typing its prefix (c:/c ), or cycling with Tab, and filters to groups tagged with a matching scope (plus untagged groups).

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS class names merged onto the root element.

examples.title: Basic command menu
examples.code:
<CommandMenu
  open={open}
  onOpenChange={setOpen}
  groups={[
    {
      heading: 'Actions',
      items: [
        { id: 'new', label: 'New file', shortcut: ['⌘', 'N'], onSelect: createFile },
        { id: 'search', label: 'Search docs', keywords: ['find'], onSelect: openSearch },
      ],
    },
  ]}
/>

examples.title: Scoped search with rich rows and inline actions
examples.description: A scope chip filters to Clusters, matched glyphs are highlighted, each row carries a mono metadata line + status pill, and the selected row reveals Open (↵) / New tab (⌘↵) inline actions.
examples.code:
<CommandMenu
  open={open}
  onOpenChange={setOpen}
  scopes={[
    { id: 'clusters', label: 'Clusters', prefix: 'c' },
    { id: 'orgs', label: 'Orgs', prefix: 'o' },
    { id: 'commands', label: 'Commands', prefix: '>' },
  ]}
  groups={[
    {
      heading: 'Clusters',
      scope: 'clusters',
      items: [
        {
          id: 'prod-eu',
          label: 'prod-eu-central-1',
          description: 'eu-central-1 · Enterprise · c9f21a04',
          status: { label: 'Healthy', tone: 'healthy' },
          actions: [
            { id: 'open', label: 'Open', shortcut: ['↵'], onSelect: () => open('prod-eu') },
            { id: 'tab', label: 'New tab', shortcut: ['⌘', '↵'], onSelect: () => openInTab('prod-eu') },
          ],
        },
      ],
    },
  ]}
/>

whenToUse: Giving power users a global Cmd/Ctrl+K palette to search and run actions or navigate
Exposing many commands across grouped categories that benefit from fuzzy search
Multi-step flows where selecting an item drills into a nested page of further commands
whenNotToUse: Picking a form value from a list — use Combobox
A small set of actions tied to a specific trigger button — use Dropdown

antiPatterns.bad: Using CommandMenu as a form field to capture a selected value
antiPatterns.good: Use Combobox for value selection inside a form
antiPatterns.why: CommandMenu is a modal command palette whose items run onSelect callbacks or open sub-pages; it has no controlled form value

antiPatterns.bad: Items that set both page and an activation (onSelect/actions), or neither
antiPatterns.why: Each item does one thing on Enter — run onSelect, run its first action, or push a nested page (page)

related.name: Combobox
related.reason: Use for filtering and selecting a form value rather than running commands

related.name: Dropdown
related.reason: Use for a small action menu anchored to a button instead of a global palette

related.name: Modal
related.reason: Renders inside a native modal dialog with backdrop dismiss

intent.a11yRationale: The search input is role="combobox" with aria-controls, aria-expanded, aria-autocomplete="list" and aria-activedescendant so navigation is announced without moving DOM focus from the input; it renders in a native <dialog> for focus trapping, the empty/loading state uses role="status", and footer hints, match highlights, status dots, and keycaps are aria-hidden as redundant decoration (status labels remain readable text). Scope pills are real buttons and the scope chip exposes an aria-labelled clear control

content.tone: Action-oriented item labels; short group headings
content.notes: Item labels are verb-first commands; use keywords for synonyms users might type

flexibility.note: Global Cmd/Ctrl+K binding can be disabled via hotkey={false} for custom triggering
onQueryChange + loading allow fetching items per keystroke
Optional scopes prop adds a filter bar/chip + typed prefixes; groups opt in via a scope id, untagged groups stay visible under any scope
Items may declare actions[]; the first is Enter, the second Cmd/Ctrl+Enter, and each is clickable. Rows also support a description metadata line and a status pill
Palette styling resolves to semantic --cascivo-color-* / --cascivo-radius-modal tokens
